name: zlauder-openai
description: Launch a per-project ZlauDeR proxy for Codex's OpenAI provider.

interface.shortDescription: PII masking proxy for Codex OpenAI traffic
interface.longDescription: Starts or reuses a per-project ZlauDeR proxy configured for api.openai.com so Codex can route its built-in OpenAI provider through local PII masking.
defaultPrompt: Check whether this Codex project is routed through ZlauDeR
